pageContext.name: No. 5
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Mighty Jaxx present the No. 5 Vinyl Collectible.  No. 5, a 60-year-old man time traveler and master assassin trapped in the body of a 13-year-old, is captured in YARMS Studios' signature style with clean lines and minimalist aesthetics.  He is accompanied by Dolores who has gone through thick and thin with him while he was trapped in the future.  Immortalize the touching moment when No. 5 is reunited with Dolores with The Umbrella Academy: No. 5 by YARMS.
